calendar.matters:
Petition For (1) Settlement Of Account And Report Of Trustee And (2) Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-29-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christina Nelson for Marie Suttles (Trustee).

The Court noted that no one else was making an appearance. Ms. Nelson stated that there are no objections what so ever. The Court questions why the payment to Vivian's Attorney was not treated as a distribution to Vivian. Ms. Nelson stated that it was the determination of the Trustee and that all of the Beneficiaries agree that the services provided benefitted the Trust as a whole. Ms. Nelson also stated that she submitted for filing a declaration in response to the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition for Settlement of Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is under submission pending review of said declaration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
